sentences.text: Hi dearest. Are you settling in? Your new home is so far away, make sure you're keeping in touch with us back home.
Also, you should make some new friends, meet some new people. Really, you don’t go out enough.

Speaking of which, have you downloaded that app your cousin mentioned? ... ... You haven’t even looked at it yet? Well, you should go on at least one date. It’ll be good for you. Like your therapist said you should try make some connections.
Ok well, talk soon. Love you.
